description:
Data Preset reference is a component that takes any reference type for PresetReference. When this is triggered by a DataPreset, this sets ``TargetReference`` to ``PresetReference``.
}}

fields.PresetReference: The field reference for the preset. Since this is a generic component, it can be used with any type of reference.
fields.TargetReference: A reference to the reference field of the same type as PresetReference.
